title: JoomPro | Simplifique a sua importação da China
description: JoomPro é a solução ideal para importação da China — da negociação até a entrega no seu estoque
extracted:
### Company Structure
- JoomPro is part of the **Grupo Joom**.
- **Grupo Joom**:
  - Founded in June 2016 in Riga, Latvia.
  - Offices in Europe, Asia, and Latin America.
  - Offers an ecosystem of solutions for e-commerce, aiding consumers and companies.
- **JoomPro**:
  - Import management company specialized in the Chinese market.
  - Provides end-to-end solution: supplier negotiation, manufacturing, customization, quality control, documentation, customs clearance, and logistics from origin to client stock.
- Related entities under Grupo Joom:
  - **JoomPro**: Described as above.
  - **Joom Pulse**: AI-powered data platform to optimize marketplace operations, maximize sales, understand competitors, and make informed decisions.

### Team Locations
- JoomPro teams in **Portugal**, **Brazil**, and **China**.
- JoomPro offices in **Brazil**, **China**, **Hong Kong**, and **Portugal**.
- Grupo Joom offices in **Europe**, **Asia**, and **Latin America** (specific countries: Riga, Latvia; Brazil; China; Hong Kong; Portugal).

### Partnerships
- **Nossos parceiros**: Mentioned but no specific names or details listed.
- Case study partnership/example: **VM Loja** (founder and CEO: Vinicius Moura, Home & Decor segment) reduced import costs by 38% using JoomPro for customized, profitable products from China.

### Number of Employees
No details available.

### Revenue Model
No details available.

### Operational Specifics
- Online catalog available.
- End-to-end import services: negotiation with suppliers, manufacturing, customization, quality control, documentation, customs clearance (desembaraço aduaneiro), logistics from origin to client stock.
- Focus: cost reduction, risk mitigation, time savings.
- Specialized in imports from China: simple, secure, varied high-quality profitable products.

### Legal Entity in Brazil, CNPJ
No details available.

### Customs/Regulatory Compliance
- Handles **documentation** and **desembaraço aduaneiro** (customs clearance) as part of end-to-end services.
- Blog content mentions:
  - "Impostos na importação: quais são e como calcular" (import taxes from China and calculation).
  - "NCM: o que é e o que tem a ver com importação" (NCM classification system for imports).
No other specifics on handling or compliance stated.
